detail: DefaultLogger (DB), ApplicationInsightsLogger (Azure Monitor), FinalEmailLogger (email on Fatal). All registered in DI. System resolves all three via CompositeLogger pattern.
rule: Three logger implementations — all injected via ISystemLogger

detail: AppSetting(RequestLogLevel=160). Values: off (null), 'Error' (only >=400), 'All' (every request). Never log in production at 'All' — performance impact.
ISystemLogger.InsertLog() truncates ShortMessage to 1500 chars. FullMessage (stack trace) is NVARCHAR(MAX) — no truncation.
rule: ShortMessage is bounded — FullMessage is unbounded

detail: Any HttpClient registered in DI gets OutgoingHttpClientLoggingHandler automatically. Services do NOT call log methods for external calls — the handler does it transparently.
rule: Outbound HTTP logging is automatic via DelegatingHandler

detail: KRR/KoFuVi calls write to NorwegianOutgoingRequestLogs — separate table for billing/compliance separation.
rule: Norwegian request logs are separate from general outbound logs

detail: cleanup_systemlogs, cleanup_requestlogs batch jobs delete rows older than retention threshold. Prevents unbounded growth.

RULE[wiki:Blob-storage]: Azure Blob 'errorlogs' container used for 3 specific critical failures: (1) Dapper cannot connect to DB, (2) Dapper license invalid, (3) Email send failure (raw SendGrid response). These are NOT routed through ISystemLogger but written directly to blob.
RULE[wiki:Blob-storage]: Azure Blob '' container = Azure App Service platform logs (separate from application logs).
